items.text:
**You're getting auditions.**

**People tell you you're talented.**

**So why aren't you booking?**

Here's something we wish more actors knew:

You can be incredibly talented and still not book.

Those things are not mutually exclusive.

In this free class replay, we break down the five things that stop great actors from booking and the simple fixes that make auditions feel more truthful, connected, and memorable.

Because the problem usually isn't talent.

**It's that nobody ever taught you how casting actually experiences an audition.**

🎥 Watch the replay now:

[https://youtu.be/7aGQgp8Pbzk?si=yK3iZXxGNJSEHM0N](https://youtu.be/7aGQgp8Pbzk?si=yK3iZXxGNJSEHM0N)

If you've ever wondered, "What am I missing?" This class is for you.

items.text:
Turn VO Auditions Into Bookings

Marc Graue’s audition techniques focus on making strong, authentic choices, bringing scripts to life, and standing out in a crowded marketplace. His animation character training helps actors create memorable, believable characters with unique voices, personalities, and emotional depth—skills that can elevate both auditions and bookings
#MarcGraue, #VoiceOverCoach, #VoiceActing, #VoiceOverAuditions, #AnimationVoiceOver, #CharacterVoices, #VoiceOverTips, #VoiceActor, #AnimationActing, #VoiceOverTeacher #VideoGameVoiceActor, #AuditionTips, #VoiceOverTraining, #VoiceOverCareer, #CartoonVoices, #VoiceOverSuccess, #CharacterCreation, #VoiceOverLife, #DemoProducer, #HollywoodVoiceOver, #VoiceActingCoach

items.text:
**CASTING SURREY-BASED SOCCER FAMILIES FOR TSN SPORTSCENTRE SEGMENT**

Hi all, I'm a producer working on behalf of Paper Route Studios ([https://www.thisispaperroute.com/documentaries](https://www.thisispaperroute.com/documentaries)), led by award-winning Executive Producer Corey Russell (credits include ***All or Nothing: Toronto Maple Leafs***).

We're currently casting **Surrey-based **soccer-loving families for a TSN SportsCentre segment tied to the opening of Western Canada’s first Jumpstart Community Soccer Pitch in Surrey. The piece will celebrate the impact of grassroots sport and the opportunities it creates for local families. 

We're looking to hear from families with an interesting personal connection to playing soccer - whether it has brought your family together, created opportunities, helped someone through a difficult time, or simply become an important part of your lives. If you have a soccer story you'd love to share, we'd love to hear from you!  

If this sounds like your family, please get in touch!

WhatsApp/text Adam at (647)562-0767 or email at [casting@thisispaperroute.com](mailto:casting@thisispaperroute.com) if interested. Thanks!

Thank you,

Adam
items.title: Documentaries — Paper Route Studios

items.text:
# **CASTING** **CALL** — Girls' Night Out Short Film **SUPPORTING & BG**

A cinematic short film about five Black women navigating one Friday evening together in Vancouver, BC.
We are currently casting Supporting Roles and Background Performers. Seeking performers from all experience levels.

SUPPORTING ROLES 
GLADYS: 40s–60s, White Female, Office colleague
COLLEAGUE #1: Late 20s–30s, White Female, Office colleague
LISA: Late 20s–40s, Female, Open Ethnicity, Possibly Voice Over, One-liner
COLLEAGUE #2: Late 20s–40s, White Male, One-liner
COLLEAGUE #3: Late 20s–40s, White Male, One-liner
OLDER MAN: 60+, Male, Open Ethnicity, Apartment neighbour, One-liner

BACKGROUND PERFORMERS To authentically reflect the cultural richness & diversity of Vancouver, we especially encourage submissions from Indigenous, Black, Latino, East Asian, South Asian, Southeast Asian, Middle Eastern, Mixed-Race, and White performers. All ethnicities, backgrounds, body types, abilities, and experience levels are welcome to submit.

• Restaurant Attendees
• Office Background
• Coat Check Staff
• Main Server #1 & Server #2
• Street Pedestrians
• Train Passengers

SHOOT DATES
August 21–24, 2026
Vancouver, BC
VOLUNTEER / IN-KIND PRODUCTION
Participants will receive: Screen Credit, Professional BTS Stills, Reel/Portfolio Material, Film Copy Upon Completion, Priority on Next Paid, Project, Targeting Festival Submission

TO SUBMIT
Email: **gnothefilm@gmail.com** (FULL NAME, HEIGHT, LOCATION, UNION STATUS, HEADSHOT, RESUME / REEL (if available), ROLE OF INTEREST & AVAILABILITY

"Five Black women. One Friday. Everything unsaid."
[#VancouverCasting](https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/vancouvercasting?__tn__=*NK*F) [#VancouverActors](https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/vancouveractors?__tn__=*NK*F) [#CastingCall](https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/castingcall?__tn__=*NK*F) [#BackgroundPerformers](https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/backgroundperformers?__tn__=*NK*F) [#SupportingRoles](https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/supportingroles?__tn__=*NK*F) [#WomenInFilm](https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/womeninfilm?__tn__=*NK*F) [#IndependentFilm](https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/independentfilm?__tn__=*NK*F) [#BIPOCArtists](https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/bipocartists?__tn__=*NK*F) [#VancouverFilm](https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/vancouverfilm?__tn__=*NK*F) [#GirlsNightOutFilm](https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/girlsnightoutfilm?__tn__=*NK*F)

sharedPost.text: Der Juli bringt fantastisches Kinowetter! Highlights sind Disneys Animations-Sequel Vaiana (Start: 9. Juli) und die Fortsetzung von Toy Story 5 (Start: 23. Juli). Was man sonst noch am Schirm haben sollte, verrät Sarah Fuchs in ihrer „Movietime“ am Hollabrunner Lokalsender radioYpsilon.

items.text:
Looking for 1 actor and 1 actress who’d be down to help me test out a new lens for an upcoming film.

Nothing too crazy — we’d just meet at a park and shoot a few cinematic scenes/moments to see how the lens looks. This is perfect for anyone who wants some film-style footage they might be able to use for their reel or socials.

Trying to give actors a chance to get footage that looks like it belongs in a real film, while I test the lens and build out some visuals.

If you’re interested, send me a headshot/photo and any reel or acting clips if you have them, best form of contact is IG: mateokbernard.

items.text:
CASTING CALL: Female Lead (Maria) for Independent Short Film "DEBITUM"
Project Title: DEBITUM
Format: Independent Short Drama
Location: Bedford / Milton Keynes area
Shoot Date for this role: Saturday, July 11th, 2026 (Daytime & Evening)
Compensation: This is a self-funded indie passion project. Food/catering on set is provided, and travel expenses within the local area will be fully covered. Paid rates are negotiable for talent with the right experience (please state your rates when applying).
👤 ROLE DESCRIPTION:
 MARIA (Female, playing age: late 20s – mid 30s). Any ethnicity.
 Character Bio: Maria is the wife of John, a military veteran struggling with severe PTSD. She is warm, loving, and patient, acting as the emotional anchor for their family and their 6-year-old son. However, she carries her own quiet weight, watching her husband fight his inner demons.
 Key Scenes: A warm, domestic family scene in the kitchen (daytime) and a heavy, emotionally intense dramatic dialogue with her husband in the living room (evening), where she helps him make a life-changing decision.
We are looking for an actress who can deliver a subtle, deeply grounded, and emotionally authentic performance.
✉️ HOW TO APPLY:
If you are interested in auditioning, please send an email with the subject line "CASTING: MARIA" to:
📧 info@bmcinema.co.uk
Please include:
1. Your Headshot & Spotlight link 
2. Your Acting Reel / Showreel or short video introduction
3. Your location and availability for Saturday, July 11th.
4. Your rates/quotes 
We look forward to reviewing your applications

items.text:
Seasons in the City is a short-form scripted series made for social media, inspired by Sex and the City but set in London. 

Each episode runs 1-3 minutes and follows four women in their early thirties who are a true representation of the city, now newly settled in central London, as they build their careers, chase London life, and discover that the truest richness in life is the female friendships you make along the way. 

It is glossy, funny, and honest, with London itself as the fifth character. The show launches alongside Seasons, an app that connects women and send them do cool activies in the city.

Although this is a small production with a modest budget, it is shot cinematically with an experienced crew, and all roles are paid.

We are casting four leads:

Camilla. An American content creator who just moved to London, warm and charming but a little lost.

Eloise, the English Rose. British old money, an art curator, polished and guarded, longing for something real.

Naomi, the Life of the Party. Nigerian, confident and magnetic, rebuilding her life after heartbreak.

Nour, the Self-Made Baddie. A Muslim implant surgeon from East London, pragmatic and witty, finally putting herself first.

All roles are for women in their early thirties, based in London. 

Acting experience is a big plus but not essential, we care most about authenticity and presence.

To apply: use the Mandy link below if you have an account, or apply directly on our website, which will get you a faster reply.

You can also DM me for more details about specific characters. 

[Mandy link: https://www.mandy.com/aa/project/3176727/seasons-and-the-city/]

[Website link: ourseasons.app/casting]

items.text: It’s been an increasingly busy summer so far! So we are currently still casting Huntrix and Princess character performers in Colorado Springs, Denver, and their surrounding areas! More details below 👑✨

sharedPost.text:
✨ CASTING CALL ✨
📍 Colorado Springs, Denver & surrounding areas

Due to an overwhelming increase in bookings — including frequent double and triple bookings — Once Upon A Dream is currently looking to expand our dream team of professional character performers!

As our cast continues to grow, we are actively working toward expanding authentic and diverse representation within these roles and are especially seeking performers of color for our Huntrix casting needs. Performers of Asian descent especially are strongly encouraged to apply!

Roles Needed: Rumi, Mira, Zoey, and all Saja boys.

What We’re Looking For:

✨ Comfortable performing in character and interacting with kids
✨ Great with children (experience with special needs children is a HUGE bonus!)
✨Acting skills (singing is a plus, but not required)
✨Flexible weekend availability
✨Reliable, enthusiastic, and passionate about creating magical memories

No professional training required — just heart, commitment, and a love for bringing stories to life. Training and costumes will be provided. 

💌 Interested in joining the magic?

• DM us via any of our social media platforms
• Text (719) 246-7591, or
• Email onceuponadream.co@outlook.com 

#coloradosprings #performers #theaterlife #characterperformers #castingcall

items.text:
Urgently seeking a male-identifying actor for "Cryptophasia"! If interested, please contact stagebugztheatre@gmail.com asap!

All details at: [[https://www.stagebugztheatre.com/auditions](https://www.stagebugztheatre.com/auditions)](https://www.stagebugztheatre.com/auditions?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExV3RXeUh4bEozcTA4WGZEMnNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR6wuYcyKwdVXjka-8n85mtcPepsYDaVlZl5AhJEWK7jZmcpT2zQ4DYs9KYpIg_aem_JXKrh2NpoDhdGHQn3VfNXw)

**Dates:**

Rehearsals will be held June 30th through July 18th on select weekdays and Saturdays.  Rehearsal schedule is flexible for this role.

Rehearsals will primarily be located at Koelbel Library (5955 S Holly St, Centennial)

**Tech rehearsals:** July 20th-22nd at the Three Leaches Theatre (1560 Teller Street, Lakewood).

**Performances: **July 23rd, 24th, and 25th at 7 PM; July 26th at 2 PM, at the Three Leaches Theatre (1560 Teller Street, Lakewood).

Compensation: $100 stipend plus portion of profits

**Show Synopsis:**

Cryptophasia (N)- The phenomenon of an autonomous language developed by twins that only the two children can understand.

​

Anna and Bella Lavey, soul mates and identical twins joined at the hip, have grown up believing that they cannot live without each other. But when Anna develops a fatal heart condition, the girls are confronted with the true cost of freedom--if such a thing even exists at all. At its core, this play explores the universality of having an identity thrust upon us, one which both binds and defines us.

**Character Description:**

Unk/Dr. Truman (Male-identifying, 18+ to play 30s-60s)- Actor will double as Missy's goofy, somewhat oblivious father and Anna and Bella's caring but emotionally guarded pediatrician.
items.previewDescription: Initial auditions for "Cryptophasia" have concluded at this time, however we are still seeking actors for select roles and will accept submissions of a headshot and resume to stagebugztheatre@gmail.com for further consideration. ​

***NOW CASTING***

Have you ever wanted to be part of something that inspires, challenges, and changes lives?

Classy Chele Productions is looking for talented and passionate individuals to join the cast of our upcoming gospel stage play, *Stand In Your Truth.*

We are seeking:

Actors & Actresses
Major & Supporting Roles

Background Singers
Soprano * Alto * Tenor

Age 21+
Experience Preferred, Not Required

This is more than a performance.
It's a story about family, secrets, healing, and the courage to face the truth.

Audition appointments are filling, so don't wait to reserve your spot.

Auditions:
Saturday, July 25, 2026

Location:
Stone Mountain, GA

Register today at:
www.iamclassychele.com

We can't wait to see what you bring to the stage.

items.text:
🐈‍⬛💰WEŹ UDZIAŁ W IDŹ NA CAŁOŚĆ 

📅 SZCZEGÓŁY:
•Daty nagrań, wybierz 1 
26 czerwca, 1,2 lipca 

•Mile widziane zgłoszenia z rodziną, grupą znajomych. 

• Gwarantowana kasa: Każdy uczestnik otrzymuje 120 zł netto za samo przybycie do studia! 
• Przygoda życia: Poczuj magię telewizji w profesjonalnym studio.

• Gdzie: Warszawa (Szeligi, Transcolor Studio,Szeligowska 48) – dojazd we własnym zakresie.

items.text:
❗AKTOR REKLAMOWY POSZUKIWANY ❗

Szukamy charyzmatycznego aktora/prezentera do pełnienia roli tzw. “twarzy” elektromarketu na TikToku i Instagramie.

💡Zależy nam na aktorze/modelu, który:
* ma świetną charyzmę,
* ma postawną budowę ciała,
* jest w wieku 25-45 lat
* ma oryginalną mimikę, styl mówienia, wygląd (coś wyróżniającego jest mile widziane!),,
* ma dystans do siebie i poczucie humoru,
* komfortowo czuje się przed kamerą,
* przebywa w Warszawie (lub nie ma problemu z dojazdem na własny koszt)
* jest dostępny w lipcu.

📩 Jeśli czujesz, że to o Tobie, to  koniecznie prześlij zgłoszenie mailowo na adres: ** casting@kolektywkreatywny.pl **
(kontakt wyłącznie mailowy)

➡️ Co powinno zawierać zgłoszenie?
* Podstawowe dane oraz wymiary.
* Portfolio, czy inne materiały, które pokazują Twoje skille (koniecznie w wirtualnej formie, bez konieczności pobierania).
* Proponowana wycena Twojej pracy za dzień zdjęciowy

Czekamy na Twoje zgłoszenie!

# **Headshots that make you look like you’re supposed to be in the role.**

I specialise in expression-led, casting-ready headshots that read clearly on Spotlight and other casting platforms.

If you want to work in the comfort of your home (or a place near you), I can come with the studio to you. If you don't mind travelling, you're welcome in my studio in Grantham, Lincolnshire.

Feel free to reach out via DM or via:

[https://www.CaptivatingHeadshots.co.uk](https://www.CaptivatingHeadshots.co.uk)

items.text:
📍 WARSZAWA | 20–22 lipca
Film dyplomowy | non-profit
Poszukujemy aktorów do następujących ról:

MATYLDA (11–15 lat) – główna rola Nieśmiała, spokojna dziewczyna zamknięta w swoim świecie. Rola bez kwestii dialogowych, oparta przede wszystkim na ekspresji i fizyczności.

OLEK (11–15 lat) Wesoły, energiczny chłopak. Rola z tekstem.

Preferujemy dziecięcych aktorów z doświadczeniem przed kamerą lub scenicznym.

SARKOMERA (18–35 lat) Alter ego Matyldy w świecie fantasy. Postać inspirowana Conanem Barbarzyńcą, dlatego poszukujemy osoby o sportowej, umięśnionej sylwetce.

MIREK (45–75 lat) Ciepły, serdeczny woźny. Dobry duch szkoły, do której uczęszczają bohaterowie.

Prosimy o przesłanie:
* zdjęcia twarzy,
* wizytówki aktorskiej lub demo,
z dopiskiem, na którą rolę się zgłaszacie, na adres: julia.klijer@gmail.com
Do zobaczenia!

items.text:
CASTING CALL – ISLANDER
WICKED FRIDAYS| NOC Theatre| London| Paid

NOC Theatre is casting Ariel in WICKED FRIDAYS a new psychological horror thriller premiering at Grim Fest 2026. 

We're looking for a Black, Mixed Heritage or Latin (South American) male performer (playing age 19–25) to portray Ariel – a charismatic, restless islander who longs for escape. Charming and magnetic, but with an unpredictable edge.

An island accent is required. Accents can include:

• Jamaican

• St. Lucian

• Bajan

• Trinidadian

• Spanish

• Portuguese

Etc.

Production Details

Paid- £600 plus performance bonus 

London

Performances: 13–17 October 2026 (Grim Fest)

Auditions

6–7 July

To apply, please send your:

* Headshot

* CV

* Spotlight link (if applicable)

Email: noctheatrecompany@gmail.com

Please share with anyone who might be right for the role.

items.text:
📸 **LET’S TALK HEADSHOTS!** 🎭

Choosing a headshot can be daunting, whether you’re a seasoned pro or just starting out. But it’s the first thing casting directors see, and on our app, a great photo is key to getting your profile approved for new opportunities.

We want to make this a supportive space to share advice and help each other out.

👇 **Let’s chat in the comments:**

* What makes a "good" headshot to you?
* What is your biggest barrier when it comes to getting headshots done?
* What’s your best tip for feeling confident in front of the lens?

**📷 Calling Professional Headshot Photographers!**

Want to connect with our community? Make yourself known in the comments below! Drop your location, a link to your work, or your top piece of advice for actors looking to book a session.

✨ **Make a profile, add your headshot, and become approved today!** Get ready for upcoming opportunities by setting up your account right now. 

👉 **Build your profile here:**

[https://appcastingcalls.uk/](https://appcastingcalls.uk/)

#ActorsHeadshots #UKActors #ActingAdvice #HeadshotPhotographer #CastingCallsUK #ActorLife

ZAGRAJ W FILMIE! STATYSTKI POSZUKIWANE!

Trwają zdjęcia do nowego filmu dla najbardziej znanej platformy streamingowej! To komedia, która skupia się w okół kobiet, dlatego szukamy Pań w wieku 18-60 lat jako uczestniczek protestu!

Przyjdź na plan i baw się świetnie razem z nami! 

Nie trzeba mieć doświadczenia! Zobacz jak wygląda powstawanie filmu od kulis! 

DATY: 5, 6, 8, 10/07/2026 - można zgłosić się na wszystkie dni lub wybrane 

MIEJSCE: Warszawa

STAWKA: 110 zł płatne gotówką po planie 

ZGŁOSZENIA:
justyna@sceneria.com.pl

W TYTULE: PROTEST + daty dostępności 

W TREŚCI: imię, nazwisko, wiek, numer telefonu, miejsce zamieszkania, zdjęcie twarzy i sylwetki 

DAJ ZNAĆ KOLEŻANKOM - CHODŹCIE RAZEM NA PLAN! DO ZOBACZENIA!

items.text:
Hello everyone,
I recently graduated in Directing and Cinematography and I’m currently open to new opportunities in film and video production.
I’m particularly interested in roles as a Director, Assistant Director, or in the Camera Department, but I’m also open to other creative opportunities on set, I’d love to be involved in new creative projects.
If you’re looking for someone for your crew or know of any opportunities, please feel free to contact me - I’d be happy to share my portfolio
Thank you!
•
•
•
Cześć wszystkim,
Niedawno ukończyłam studia z reżyserii i operatorskie, a obecnie jestem otwarta na nowe możliwości i współprace w branży filmowej oraz produkcji wideo.
Szczególnie interesują mnie role reżyserki, asystentki reżysera oraz praca w pionie operatorskim, ale jestem również otwarta na inne kreatywne możliwości na planie. Chętnie zaangażuję się w nowe projekty i zdobędę kolejne doświadczenia.
Jeśli szukacie kogoś do swojej ekipy lub wiecie o ciekawych możliwościach - zapraszam do kontaktu. Z przyjemnością prześlę swoje portfolio.
Dziękuję!

items.text:
Booking photo sessions in Los Angeles for July & August

Need headshots? I'm a portrait photographer offering packages for actors to have the essentials and help brand themselves across multiple platforms, from casting sites to social media.

These packages include headshots, full body shots, stylized photos and candids. I also offer high quality scene tapes. As a filmmaker with experience in casting, I want to make sure that you not only have the media you need, but are best marketing yourself to get the types of roles you want!

You can find more of my work on my website www.mariellebosco.com or instagram.com/mariellebosco and can contact me via DMs or email bosco.marielle@gmail.com.

items.text: Super opportunities for all ages, profit share.

sharedPost.text:
The Walk of life: Audition call
Synopsis:

The Walk of Life is based on the book of the same name by Bill Booth and adapted by Sharon Colpman and the Tag Team Writers II; it was further abridged by Kevin Foott.

It is the story of the life of Bill and his wife Cathy and the events that shaped them over the course of their marriage together, culminating in the sad passing of Bill’s beloved Cathy.

The play is going to take the form of an immersive theatrical experience at Studio Beyond during the Liverpool Fringe on 7th October 2026 and will be produced by Sharon Colpman @MIW Productions and Directed by Kevin Foott.

 

We are looking for a number of roles for the piece which include:

BILL:​​​Will play Bill at all stages of his adolescent and adult life.

​​​Male; acting age between 30 – 45

 

The BOOTHIES:​Four children playing the parts of Young Bill and his three brothers; ​​​ALAN, JOHN and RAY.

​​​Males; acting age 8 – 11

TEENAGE

CADETS:​​Two young actors playing Bill’s fellow cadets CLIFFY and KENNY

​​​Males; acting age 15 – 17

(If we are unable to identify four children, we will look to identify 3 young actors to play the roles of ‘The Boothies’; with BILL playing the other.)

CATHY’S

MATES:​​Two female actors playing Cathy’s mates/co-workers RUBY and ​​​​SHEILA

​​​Female; acting age 25 – 35

BILL’S MUM:​A strong working-class character.

​​​Female: acting age 65 – 75

 

JANE:​​​Bill and Cathy’s daughter, a female actor who potentially resembles ​​​Cathy.

​​​Female: acting age 25 – 35

 Please note, apart from Bill, these roles are not large. 

Rehearsals will take place at Studio Beyond.

If you are interested in getting involved in this exciting project please send a copy of your CV or spotlight link to Kevin Foott, kwfs@msn.com; make sure your contact details include your telephone number. Payment is Profit Share

items.title: Super opportunities for all ages, profit share.

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL – LIVERPOOL 🎬

RED BRICK WAR

We are currently casting for a professionally produced Proof of Concept film for an upcoming Liverpool-based action thriller.

RED BRICK WAR is a gritty crime and action story set in Liverpool, centred around former Tier 1 operator Sonny Doyle, who returns home after his teenage nephew is left in a coma following a brutal gang attack. What begins as a hunt for those responsible quickly uncovers a far larger network involving organised crime, corruption and private military contractors operating in the shadows.

We are currently seeking actors for several principal and supporting roles, including:

• Male – 35-45 (Lead)
• Female – 30-45
• Male - 30-45 ( x3 )
• Male – 18-25
• Female – 18-25
• Supporting and featured speaking roles
• Background performers and extras
• Production specialists

Filming will take place in and around Liverpool.

This Proof of Concept is being produced to support feature film development, funding and industry pitching.

Whilst this stage of the project is unpaid, successful applicants will receive:

• Professional footage suitable for showreels
• Professional photography and behind-the-scenes content
• Full screen credit
• The opportunity to be considered for future paid production roles should the feature move into full production

Experience is welcome but not essential for all roles.

To apply, please send:

• Headshot
• Acting CV (if available)
• Showreel (if available)
• Contact details

📧 info@redbrickwar.co.uk

@redbrickwarfilm

Liverpool, UK

RED BRICK WAR

Brotherhood. Loyalty. Consequence.

SOME DEBTS ARE PAID IN BLOOD.

Angela Boehm Casting is now casting for a commercial that is filming in the Northeast, OH area July 29th - 31st.

DETAILS:

Project: DeWalt Pro Outdoor Campaign

Filming Location: Northeast, OH (must be local hire)

Fitting Date: July 28th

Shoot Date(s): July 29th-31st

*Talent will only be needed 1-2 days, but please stay available until schedule is set*

Rain Date(s): August 1st & 2nd

Rate: 

$300 for Fitting Day
$1000 plus 20% per shoot day

Usage: Full photo and video buyout used globally in perpetuity - not for broadcast.

WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR:
Real professionals in their 20's and early 30's who have experience
using one or all of the landscaping / outdoor maintenance tools listed below. Scenes will involve using the tools practically on location in a realistic way.

Open to all ethnicities, and we strongly encourage Hispanic/LatinX performers to apply!

Tools:
-String Trimmer
-Straight Shaft Edger
-Fixed Pole Hedge Trimmer
-Backpack Blower
-Handheld Blower
-Telescoping Pole Saw
-Chainsaw

CLICK HERE TO SUBMIT: https://bit.ly/4vGW5uG

As this casting call is looking for real experience feel free to share this post on social media! 

Kind Regards, 
Angela Boehm Casting 

PLEASE NOTE: This is just a submission. If you are booked, we will reach out to YOU.

items.text:
🎭 Ever fancied giving acting or improvisation a go?

I'm launching a brand new Adult Improvisation Class in Huyton, starting Sunday 5th July, and whether you've never stepped on stage before or you've acted in the past and want to sharpen your skills, you'll be very welcome.

I've spent nearly 20 years performing in improvised murder mysteries, and as co-owner of Alara Entertainment, improvisation has become a huge part of what I do. Every show is different, and thinking on your feet is a skill that's useful both on and off the stage.

These sessions will be relaxed, supportive, and packed with fun games and exercises designed to build confidence, creativity, quick thinking, and performance skills. No scripts, no pressure, and absolutely no experience required. And best of all, it's completely free of charge!

📍 An Hour For Others, Huyton
🕖 7:00pm every Sunday
📅 Starting Sunday 5th July

If you've been looking for a new hobby, want to meet new people, or simply fancy trying something different, come along and give it a go.

Drop me a message if you'd like more information or to reserve your place!

items.text:
Projekt dla aplikacji zdrowotnej (Warszawa)
Szukamy modelki 40+ (podobna z referensem - proszę zobaczyć zdjęcia niżej ✅🎉✅🎉) 

do nagrań wideo dla aplikacji mobilnej dedykowanej zdrowiu szyi i kręgosłupa (profilaktyka oraz łagodzenie bólów pleców). Zadaniem modelki będzie zaprezentowanie ćwiczeń rozciągających i zwiększających mobilność (łącznie 33 lekkie, bezpieczne ćwiczenia).

🗓️ Harmonogram i lokalizacja

 Miejsce: Warszawa

 Próby: 2 niepełne dni (po 6 godzin) w okresie 01.07 – 05.07 (dokładne daty do ustalenia).

 Dni zdjęciowe: 3 dni w przedziale 04.07 – 12.07 (dokładne daty w trakcie potwierdzania).

💰 Wynagrodzenie i prawa (Netto)

 Dzień zdjęciowy: 2220 PLN / 600 USD za dzień

 Dzień prób: 775 PLN / 210 USD za dzień

 CAŁKOWITY BUDŻET: 2220 USD 

netto (kwota obejmuje dni zdjęciowe, próby oraz pełne przeniesienie praw do wizerunku).

Zgłoszenia prosimy wysyłać na adres e-mail: tatianamakhdi@gmail.com

W wiadomości prosimy podać następujące informacje:

1. Imię i nazwisko

2. Wiek

3. Wzrost

4. Numer telefonu

Do zgłoszenia prosimy dołączyć:

 Zdjęcia / portfolio

 Wizytówkę wideo (język nie ma znaczenia)

 Dodatkowy atut: Jeśli posiadasz wideo, na którym ćwiczysz lub uprawiasz sport, koniecznie je podeślij!

items.text:
Film Spring Open zaprasza!

DROGIE AKTORKI!

A gdyby te wakacje stały się początkiem nowego rozdziału w Waszej karierze ?

Po krótkiej kursowej przerwie wracamy z elektryzującą wiadomością! I tym razem mamy coś wyjątkowego – stworzonego specjalnie dla Was.

„SIŁA TWOICH ZASOBÓW” – edycja dla aktorek 19–22 lipca 2026 Przesieka | Karkonosze

Nowa formuła warsztatu skrojona pod wakacyjny czas już na Was czeka!

To będzie niezwykłe połączenie rozwoju zawodowego i osobistego, powrotu do ciała, zatrzymania się i złapania oddechu. Bo wiemy, jak łatwo w naszej branży zgubić kontakt ze sobą – między castingami, planami filmowymi i codziennym pędem.

I teraz najważniejsze…

Jak połączyć:

-jogę,naturę i regenerację

-casting i pracę nad materiałami aktorskimi

-markę osobistą i świadomy wizerunek

-wyciszenie i budowanie odporności psychicznej?

Brzmi jak plan idealny?

Stworzyłyśmy miejsce, w którym to wszystko spotyka się w harmonii. W cudownej, malowniczej Przesiece, pośród karkonoskiej natury.

A jeśli dodamy do tego trzy prowadzące – absolutne ekspertki w swoich dziedzinach:

Julię Popkiewicz, Izabelę Gałan oraz Katarzynę Gryciuk-Krzywdę

…to pozostaje już tylko jedno:

skontaktować się z nami i zarezerwować miejsce.

Mamy przeczucie graniczące z pewnością, że nasza skrzynka rozgrzeje się do czerwoności!

Dlatego nie zwlekajcie.

Jeśli czujesz, że potrzebujesz odzyskać energię, spojrzeć na swoją karierę z nowej perspektywy i spędzić kilka dni w inspirującym kobiecym gronie — „Siła Twoich Zasobów” czeka właśnie na Ciebie.

Zapraszamy do zapisów!

biuro@filmspringopen.eu 

Szczegóły znajdziecie na naszej stronie:

https://filmspringopen.eu/kurs/sila-twoich-zasobow-edycja-dla-aktorek/

W razie pytań pozostajemy do dyspozycji mailowo

Do zobaczenia w Karkonoszach!
items.title: SIŁA TWOICH ZASOBÓW – edycja dla aktorek - Film Spring Open

items.title: Days Away ATLANTA....

sharedPost.text:
UWAGA WARSZAWA i OKOLICE!!!!!
W dniu 04 lipca (sobota) będziemy realizować zdjęcia dla Teatru Telewizji w reżyserii Kaspra Bajona, na które serdecznie zapraszamy na STATYSTOWANIE Kobiety i Mężczyzn w wieku 25 - 40 lat którzy wcielą się w postacie uczestników ekskluzywnego wernisażu.
Ubieramy się na biało, na czarno lub biało-czarno.
Zdjęcia odbędą się w Warszawie w godzinach 16.00 - 22.30
Stawka od 140 zł netto za dzień zdjęciowy.
Zgłoszenie z dopiskiem TV zawierające imię i nazwisko, aktualne zdjęcie twarzy (bez nakrycia głowy), zdjęcie sylwetki oraz numer telefonu prosimy przesyłać na maila :
ricardo@mkmstudiofilm.pl
Z wybranymi osobami będziemy kontaktować się telefonicznie.
OJ BĘDZIE SIĘ DZIAŁO
Serdecznie Zapraszamy 
Załoga MKM Studio

items.text:
Poszukiwane osoby z dużym poczuciem humoru do nowo powstającego projektu Reality Show 🎬

Herkules Games będzie programem rozrywkowym publikowanym na Social Mediach marki (IG, FB, TT oraz YT).

Inspirowany między innymi Big Brotherem, The Traitors, Squid Games czy też dawnymi programami z Polski typu Bar czy Dwa Światy 🤡 Główna nagroda do wygrania to 30 tysięcy złotych oraz wiele innych mniejszych nagród pieniężnych i nie tylko. 

Planowany dzień zdjęciowy - casting jeszcze w tym roku w Warszawie! Wynagrodzenie za udział w castingu to 100PLN + wyżywienie. Dodatkowo poznasz fajną ekipę ludzi plus otrzymasz profesjonalnie wykonane zdjęcia i inne materiały które możesz wykorzystać w swoim portfolio.

Aktualnie poszukujemy osób z doświadczeniem w:
✨ Makijażu,
✨ Fryzjerstwie,
✨ Stylizacji,
🔵 Dźwiękowiec
🔴 Medyk

Jesteśmy również otwarci na dodatkowego kandydata (PAN) do pierwszej edycji programu. Mile widziana osoba z Warszawy lub okolic. Paniom dziękujemy na dzień dzisiejszy.

Poszukujemy także Pana, który miałby łączyć dwie role w programie – prowadzącego oraz opiekuna uczestników. Preferowany wiek to 25–35 lat, a miejscem zamieszkania powinna być Warszawa lub jej najbliższe okolice. Wymagane jest również doświadczenie przy podobnych formatach.

Zapraszamy do kontaktu zainteresowane osoby na pw lub maila 📩 info.herkulesgames@gmail.com

Napisz kilka zdań o sobie oraz podeślij linki do swoich social media, jeszcze lepiej jeśli dodasz do tego wizytówkę.

Chcesz dołączyć do naszego zespołu i współtworzyć projekt od strony biznesowej? Również zapraszamy do kontaktu 🙂

👋👋👋

items.text:
Short student movie from Croatia "The Last Days"
Dear all,

I am excited to share The Last Days, my graduation short fiction film, a project I have been working on for the past six months together with a wonderful creative and production team.

We have launched a crowdfunding campaign, and every contribution means a great deal to us.

Through the link below, you can find more information about the film, our team, cast, production costs, and what we are raising funds for. Any donation, no matter the amount, directly helps us complete the film and prepare it for its festival journey. The names of all donors will be included in the film’s closing credits.

The film needs to be fully edited by September 1, completed and ready for distribution by September 9, and we plan to submit it no later than September 12 to this year’s competitive short film programme Kockice at the Zagreb Film Festival. Fingers crossed we will see you there.

If you are not able to donate at the moment, sharing the campaign or following us on Instagram would also mean a lot: @posljednji_dani.film

All additional information is available through the link below.

Wishing everyone a wonderful summer, and thank you from the bottom of our hearts for every kind of support.
items.previewDescription: Short student film based in Croatia. A father-daughter drama about care, resentment and letting go. photos by / Iva Lemo and Lukas Kamber

items.text:
CASTING WARSZAWA
Szukam kobiety BLONDYNKI lub o jasnorudych / jasnobrązowych włosach, w wieku 38-50 lat, o przyjemnej aparycji. Zadbana, wysportowana. Narodowość nie ma znaczenia.

Nagrywamy materiał wideo do mobilnej aplikacji o zdrowiu: profilaktyka i łagodzenie bólu pleców (szyi i kręgosłupa) — w sumie będzie 33 łatwe i bezpieczne ćwiczenia.

Terminy:

W okresie 1–5 lipca — dwie próby (daty zostaną ustalone po wyborze aktorki) — zmiany po 6 godzin.

W okresie 6–12 lipca — trzy dni zdjęciowe (dokładne daty podamy później) — pełne zmiany.

Gaża: 2220 USD = 8360 PLN (według dzisiejszego kursu, brutto).

Kwota obejmuje dni zdjęciowe, próby oraz przekazanie praw.

Brak ograniczeń co do udziału w innych projektach.

Przyjmowanie zgłoszeń DO 14:00 we wtorek (30 czerwca).

Osoby zainteresowane proszę o przesłanie na adres: filmyklipyserialy@gmail.com

Imię i nazwisko

Wiek, wzrost, rozmiar ubrania

Numer telefonu

Zdjęcia: duże ujęcie twarzy, duże ujęcie twarzy z uśmiechem oraz zdjęcie w pełnej postaci (żeby była widoczna sylwetka)

Link do wizytówki / portfolio (w dowolnym dostępnym języku). Będzie super, jeśli macie wideo, na którym uprawiacie sport.

items.text:
# 🎬 CASTING CALL – NO-BUDGET INDIE FEATURE FILM

We are currently casting **8 volunteer actors** for a potluck party scene in an upcoming independent feature film shooting in **Langley, BC**.

This is an excellent opportunity for actors looking to build their portfolio, gain valuable on-set experience, and collaborate with a passionate team of independent filmmakers.
## Roles Available

**4 Male Actors Hindi speaking**
* Ethnicity: India
* Age: 30–40

**4 Female Actors Hindi speaking**
* Ethnicity: India
* Age: 30–40
## Shoot Details

**Location:** Langley, BC

**Shoot Dates:**
* Saturday, July 25, 2026
* Sunday, July 26, 2026

**Time:** 9:00 AM – 7:00 PM (approximately)
## Compensation

This is a **volunteer (non-paid)** opportunity.

The following will be provided:
* Meals and refreshments
* Screen credits (IMDb, where applicable)
* Copy of the completed film for your demo reel (when available)
* Valuable experience working on an independent feature film
## How to Apply

Please send:
* Headshot
* Resume (if available)
* Demo reel or self-tape 
* Contact information

To **expressentryfilm@gmail.com,** selected applicants will receive additional information about the project and audition/self-tape requirements.
# Character Descriptions
## **Mukesh** (Male, 30–40) — **Lead Supporting Role**

**Dialogue:** Approximately **10 dialogues**

A fun-loving and outgoing individual who naturally takes charge in social situations. He has a dominant personality, struggles to accept opposing opinions, and often takes disagreements personally. While charismatic, he can also be vindictive when he feels wronged.

## **Payal** (Female, 30–40) — **Supporting Role**

**Dialogue:** Approximately **1 dialogue**

Mukesh's wife. Warm, cheerful, and easygoing, she understands her husband's strengths and flaws better than anyone. She isn't afraid to challenge him when he's in the wrong and often serves as the voice of reason.

## **Chirag** (Male, 30–40) — **Lead Supporting Role**

**Dialogue:** Approximately **10 dialogues**

Honest, fair, and good-natured. Chirag enjoys spending time with friends but prefers a peaceful, drama-free life. Calm, composed, and level-headed, he avoids unnecessary conflict whenever possible.

## **Neha** (Female, 30–40) — **Supporting Role**

**Dialogue:** Approximately **5 dialogues**

Chirag's wife. She presents herself as simple, calm, and soft-spoken, but beneath the surface she is adventurous, emotionally reactive, and full of surprises. She is exceptionally good at hiding this side of herself from others.

## **Ajay** (Male, 30–40) — **Supporting Role**

**Dialogue:** Approximately **2 dialogues**

Friendly and sociable on the surface but ultimately self-serving. He has no hesitation in getting close to people if it benefits him. Ego-driven and controlling, especially in his relationship with his wife, he likes to be in charge.

## **Disha** (Female, 30–40) — **Supporting Role**

**Dialogue:** **No dialogue (featured performance)**

Ajay's wife. Genuine, kind-hearted, and always smiling. She enjoys having fun, treats everyone with respect, and never engages in gossip or speaks negatively about others. Calm, composed, and quietly resilient.

## **Rajiv** (Male, 30–40) — **Lead Supporting Role**

**Dialogue:** Approximately **8 dialogues**

Reserved, shy, and thoughtful. Rajiv enjoys being around friends but tends to stay in the background. Calm and composed, he is a quiet observer rather than the center of attention.

## **Jaya** (Female, 30–40) — **Supporting Role**

**Dialogue:** Approximately **1 dialogue**

Rajiv's wife. Gentle, warm, and soft-spoken. Like Rajiv, she is shy and reserved but enjoys social gatherings in a quieter way. She has a calm presence and a genuinely kind nature.

**Submission deadline 23rd July 2026.**

items.text: Does anyone happen to have a realistic looking prop casket / coffin I could rent for a 1 hour shoot in the Encino area of Los Angeles filming July 31st in the afternoon? Using it for a funeral scene filming inside a church. Very tight on budget here but if anyone has a prop that could work for this scene please give me a DM and we can negotiate a price. Thanks so much.

items.text:
Vertical 7/1 + 7/2
***Update: Both days have been cast, but I’ll circle back with casting needs for the 6th, 7th, and 8th later this week. Thank you!

Hi all, I’m helping out again with another vertical. 

7/1 Roles:

3 students 18+ TPY

1 teacher (age 30ish)

7/2 Roles:

6 nightclub goers (age 20-30)

*4 people will double as troublemaker high schoolers so they would like to skew on the younger side 

Pay: $135/8

Location and call time will be provided to those selected on Monday. I’ll also send wardrobe notes. 

To submit: please PM me photo and your sizes if you’re submitting for student. Wardrobe will be provided for that role so we will need to get your size ordered asap. 

Thanks!!

items.text: Hey all. My sketch comedy show will be playing at the UCB in LA on Wednesday July 22nd at 7pm. If youre in town and would like tickets to see some comedy featuring actors and comics from tv, film and reality tv please let me know, would love to have you. First 5 people to say yes will get FREE tickets.

items.text:
*The gift we give actors they give back to us tenfold. Claim this**[ FREE ONCE A YEAR OPPORTUNITY FOR ACTORS](https://www.screenactingschool.com/true-webinar-registration-page-1?fbclid=IwAR1jBMysRByB2XoevczFwjG5ZLyCrdKodw1vfBtqGUq9mr_WZnrHj6o_nvo) **to help you book leads in series and films year after year! Do not miss this free class to create the 2024 of your dreams.*

You know how terrible things come in threes? I bet you do and I sure do. 13 years ago I was coaching high profile actors ([you’d know their names](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.screenactingschool.com%2Ftrue-webinar-registration-page-1%3Ffbclid%3DIwAR1GBUt1dxQ5NDEEW4KNG3MN4rC6qKX3dgBNZOIHAb228X3q3FjHS-XwV-M&h=AT1NZrQlLntMatxZYQ0EVe1b0PDsXR3117L-ft-R87Myr8Kw5y6nyRZVBgqZBqO8bofBlenG05hGTNgz9SukPTpY_Duu8bMXokWB5CgdS8SGp95YVacWQsWSGbJEFqFG9gRYk62Ke2Gor8gEb_c-ld5zYQ&__tn__=-UK-R&c[0]=AT1QMFolJHTw0eDLxxcH9XqPOFU_22-xWW-M5xngsuW_lraCXblcF9okU_1c5JNm-fSoW0tdOQHiT7Hm3BtUlOew1ELxiP7Sn4DImb4NYk8VeMwDZKTCDtq5HOTzEVPA2Yz2bjj_EmkWVQbbRWC7uxGcabx6N9s6WA4z-uAGPAZHLO6UYDCX4cE_i2DBMmo8YH7eEsL9n1mNmf8tKGJM4LwFufRbdwLQpO8)) but I was in a third degree burn kind of low spot - no friends, no family and definitely no fortune.

***Suddenly, I realized something life changing and [TRUE.](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.screenactingschool.com%2Ftrue-webinar-registration-page-1%3Ffbclid%3DIwAR29qUK0xzKYBGHDsU2Pu0lPI7Ym4H24-QzhFQfCYy2KhnoNoEHvge-1wgM&h=AT1NZrQlLntMatxZYQ0EVe1b0PDsXR3117L-ft-R87Myr8Kw5y6nyRZVBgqZBqO8bofBlenG05hGTNgz9SukPTpY_Duu8bMXokWB5CgdS8SGp95YVacWQsWSGbJEFqFG9gRYk62Ke2Gor8gEb_c-ld5zYQ&__tn__=-U-U-UK-R&c[0]=AT1QMFolJHTw0eDLxxcH9XqPOFU_22-xWW-M5xngsuW_lraCXblcF9okU_1c5JNm-fSoW0tdOQHiT7Hm3BtUlOew1ELxiP7Sn4DImb4NYk8VeMwDZKTCDtq5HOTzEVPA2Yz2bjj_EmkWVQbbRWC7uxGcabx6N9s6WA4z-uAGPAZHLO6UYDCX4cE_i2DBMmo8YH7eEsL9n1mNmf8tKGJM4LwFufRbdwLQpO8)***

***[Click here to claim this rare opportunity to create the 2024 of your dreams.](https://www.screenactingschool.com/true-webinar-registration-page-1?fbclid=IwAR3XQox_pzy-I28fvyp-uOSjjNWG0rCY08DPy7R0k4jlyxQ38NXFD3155v4)***

***[https://www.screenactingschool.com/true-webinar-registration-page-1?fbclid=IwAR0Wcu7Vg6sw8qo5npU-DIcmeOg1jrqpgZJhvpi38cKu-HoeDWyvoVKJrhg](https://www.screenactingschool.com/true-webinar-registration-page-1?fbclid=IwAR2BreQ_l2Zk6Rw3ZsxIAS-J14CDEiMaEnFDjczrOoxMdxKb16caLmpcDGE)***

items.summary:
*The gift we give actors they give back to us tenfold. Claim this**[ FREE ONCE A YEAR OPPORTUNITY FOR ACTORS](https://www.screenactingschool.com/true-webinar-registration-page-1?fbclid=IwAR1jBMysRByB2XoevczFwjG5ZLyCrdKodw1vfBtqGUq9mr_WZnrHj6o_nvo) **to help you book leads in series and films year after year! Do not miss this free class to create the 2024 of your dreams.*

You know how terrible things come in threes? I bet you do and I sure do. 13 years ago I was coaching high profile actors ([you’d know their names](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.screenactingschool.com%2Ftrue-webinar-registration-page-1%3Ffbclid%3DIwAR1GBUt1dxQ5NDEEW4KNG3MN4rC6qKX3dgBNZOIHAb228X3q3FjHS-XwV-M&h=AT1NZrQlLntMatxZYQ0EVe1b0PDsXR3117L-ft-R87Myr8Kw5y6nyRZVBgqZBqO8bofBlenG05hGTNgz9SukPTpY_Duu8bMXokWB5CgdS8SGp95YVacWQsWSGbJEFqFG9gRYk62Ke2Gor8gEb_c-ld5zYQ&__tn__=-UK-R&c[0]=AT1QMFolJHTw0eDLxxcH9XqPOFU_22-xWW-M5xngsuW_lraCXblcF9okU_1c5JNm-fSoW0tdOQHiT7Hm3BtUlOew1ELxiP7Sn4DImb4NYk8VeMwDZKTCDtq5HOTzEVPA2Yz2bjj_EmkWVQbbRWC7uxGcabx6N9s6WA4z-uAGPAZHLO6UYDCX4cE_i2DBMmo8YH7eEsL9n1mNmf8tKGJM4LwFufRbdwLQpO8)) but I was in a third degree burn kind of low spot - no friends, no family and definitely no fortune.

***Suddenly, I realized something life changing and [TRUE.](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.screenactingschool.com%2Ftrue-webinar-registration-page-1%3Ffbclid%3DIwAR29qUK0xzKYBGHDsU2Pu0lPI7Ym4H24-QzhFQfCYy2KhnoNoEHvge-1wgM&h=AT1NZrQlLntMatxZYQ0EVe1b0PDsXR3117L-ft-R87Myr8Kw5y6nyRZVBgqZBqO8bofBlenG05hGTNgz9SukPTpY_Duu8bMXokWB5CgdS8SGp95YVacWQsWSGbJEFqFG9gRYk62Ke2Gor8gEb_c-ld5zYQ&__tn__=-U-U-UK-R&c[0]=AT1QMFolJHTw0eDLxxcH9XqPOFU_22-xWW-M5xngsuW_lraCXblcF9okU_1c5JNm-fSoW0tdOQHiT7Hm3BtUlOew1ELxiP7Sn4DImb4NYk8VeMwDZKTCDtq5HOTzEVPA2Yz2bjj_EmkWVQbbRWC7uxGcabx6N9s6WA4z-uAGPAZHLO6UYDCX4cE_i2DBMmo8YH7eEsL9n1mNmf8tKGJM4LwFufRbdwLQpO8)***

***[Click here to claim this rare opportunity to create the 2024 of your dreams.](https://www.screenactingschool.com/true-webinar-registration-page-1?fbclid=IwAR3XQox_pzy-I28fvyp-uOSjjNWG0rCY08DPy7R0k4jlyxQ38NXFD3155v4)***

***[https://www.screenactingschool.com/true-webinar-registration-page-1?fbclid=IwAR0Wcu7Vg6sw8qo5npU-DIcmeOg1jrqpgZJhvpi38cKu-HoeDWyvoVKJrhg](https://www.screenactingschool.com/true-webinar-registration-page-1?fbclid=IwAR2BreQ_l2Zk6Rw3ZsxIAS-J14CDEiMaEnFDjczrOoxMdxKb16caLmpcDGE)***

items.text:
Hey everyone, my name is Elias from 2 Liters Shady Films and I just released a new trailer for my indie horror feature film, Mocos. If you have a few minutes of your time, I’d really appreciate you checking it out.

I’m an independent filmmaker currently writing, editing, and filming the project myself, so every view, like, comment, and share truly goes a long way in supporting indie creators like me. 

I’m still actively filming and looking for anyone interested in getting involved with the feature film. No experience is necessary, and I have a ton of remote self-film scenes available that can be done right from the comfort of your own home using my detailed instructions.

If interested still plenty of scenes left, feel free to message me directly or email me at mocosthemovie@gmail.com

Thank you again for the support and for helping independent horror continue to grow!

https://youtu.be/n3SggTr8z4g?is=5eAwJMZq_17e1xFQ

topComments.text: Great eari ,you need any s as in future get on me i have experience BBC ch4 ch5 lfc and other projects all the best

Actors: I’ve been building AuditionScenes, a searchable scene and monologue database for auditions, self-tapes and class work.

You can search by genre, tone, playing age, character type and cast size, then save/download pieces and use the prep tools around them.

The monologue database is here:
https://auditionscenes.com/monologue-database

Main site:
https://auditionscenes.com

Would genuinely love feedback from actors on what kinds of material are hardest to find.

**CASTING PREGNANT WOMEN - BISCUIT COMMERCIAL **🍪

**Anna McAuley Casting is seeking Northern** **women who are currently pregnant for a biscuit brand commercial.**

We’re specifically looking for: women, friends and sisters who are 6 to 8 months pregnant.

**Filming: **22 / 23 / 24 July (Manchester) Paid opportunity.

Applicants to be based in Manchester, Leeds, Liverpool and surrounding areas. No previous acting experience needed.

Please apply with full name, location, selfie to:** hello@mcauleycasting.com **with the subject: ‘Biscuit Commercial - Pregnant Women’

sharedPost.text:
Let’s talk about it guys… Zumba. 💃

It’s great. I know loads of wonderful Zumba instructors, and there are some fantastic classes across Liverpool — honestly, you’re spoilt for choice! (Feel free to ask if you’re looking and I’ll happily point you in the right direction.)

You’ll get a brilliant workout, feel-good energy and a proper endorphin rush. What’s not to love? ☺️

You’ll find all of that in my sessions too. But also something a little deeper — building real dance technique & musicality alongside your movement confidence. Developing your dance ability as an art form as well as a workout.

And “deeper” doesn’t mean “difficult”.

Yes, there’s a slightly steeper learning curve than most fitness-based dance classes, but that’s where the growth — and the reward — comes from. My classes are still FIRMLY beginner-friendly and designed to help people learn step by step in a supportive environment. (Just check my feedback! 🥰)

Whatever route you choose the important thing is getting out there, giving it a go and moving more! ❤️ 

#learntodance #dancecommunity #confidencethroughdance #learn #moveyourbody

items.text: Does anyone happen to have a realistic looking prop casket / coffin I could rent for a 1 hour shoot in the Encino area of Los Angeles filming July 31st in the afternoon? Using it for a funeral scene filming inside a church. Very tight on budget here but if anyone has a prop that could work for this scene please give me a DM and we can negotiate a price. Thanks so much.

items.text:
CASTING VOICE ACTOR

Title: Spilled Milk

Genre: Reality

Logline: In the heart of Denver’s nightlife, Spilled Milk follows a circle of bartenders, DJ’s, influencers, and club insiders whose friendships, romances, and rivalries collide both on and off the dance floor.
 
Role:
NARRATOR (male or female) Provides voiceover narration for the opening sequences and potentially future episodes.

Production Type: Reality TV Pilot

Contact Information: luke@lostefilms.com

Run Time: Approx. 25 minutes

Compensation: Paid

Union Status: Non-Union

Audition Information: Send email with voiceover samples, we will send additional details and a brief audition script to those we want to hear more from.

Read more about the project here:
items.previewTitle: Mile High VPR: A Denver club has started filming a reality show
items.previewDescription: "I wouldn't even compare it to any show because nothing like this has ever been done before."

topComments.text: I would be interested in applying.

‼️ WARSZAWA 6-7 LIPCA ‼️
Na plan trzeciego sezonu kultowego serialu historycznego którego akcja dzieje się w latach 40 poszukujemy:

▪️ KOBIET i MĘŻCZYZN jako przechodniów, klientów i sprzedawców w sklepie

Można wziąć udział jeden lub dwa dni. Stawka 120zł za dzień gotówką po planie. 

Zgłoszenia wraz z imieniem i nazwiskiem, numerem telefonu, AKTUALNYMI zdjęciami sylwetki oraz włosów z boku, PASUJĄCYMI DATAMI oraz WYMIARAMI 

przyjmujemy na adres: KAROLINA@ONSETAGENCY.PL w tytule wpisując “SKLEP”

items.text:
Cześć, cześć! 💙💙💙
ROZPOCZYNAMY PRZYGODĘ Z NOWYM PROGRAMEM ROZRYWKOWYM!!! 🔥🔥🔥🔥

Jeżeli… Kochasz muzykę? Uwielbiasz koncertową atmosferę, emocje na żywo i świetną zabawę? To właśnie Ciebie szukamy! 🥰🤩💫

Już w lipcu w Warszawie ruszają nagrania zupełnie nowego programu muzycznego i możesz być częścią tego wyjątkowego wydarzenia! Nie musisz śpiewać ani występować – wystarczy, że dołączysz do naszej publiczności i razem z nami stworzysz niesamowitą atmosferę, którą zobaczą tysiące widzów👌🍀

Czekają na Ciebie:
🧚🏻‍♀️występy utalentowanych artystów,
🧚🏻‍♀️kulisy profesjonalnej produkcji telewizyjnej,
🧚🏻‍♀️mnóstwo pozytywnej energii i świetnych ludzi,
🧚🏻‍♀️wspomnienia, których nie da się zapomnieć!

W A R S Z A W A
👉Terminy nagrań:
1, 3, 6, 8, 9, 10, 13, 14, 15, 16, 20, 21 i 22 lipca

Gwarantujemy:
⭐️100 zł za każdy dzień zdjęciowy
⭐️Wyżywienie jak na każdej naszej widowni
⭐️Około 8–9 godzin świetnej zabawy

Liczba miejsc jest ograniczona! Wpadajcie ze znajomymi oraz rodzinką❣️

Zgłoś się wypełniając formularz:
https://forms.gle/mmsmmPwyK5BdBxK89

Lub standardowo przez maila na adres: ludzie@unagimedia.pl (w tytule wpisując rozrywka plus wybrana data / daty)

Do zobaczenia!👋🥰🥰🥰❤️

items.summary:
Cześć, cześć! 💙💙💙
ROZPOCZYNAMY PRZYGODĘ Z NOWYM PROGRAMEM ROZRYWKOWYM!!! 🔥🔥🔥🔥

Jeżeli… Kochasz muzykę? Uwielbiasz koncertową atmosferę, emocje na żywo i świetną zabawę? To właśnie Ciebie szukamy! 🥰🤩💫

Już w lipcu w Warszawie ruszają nagrania zupełnie nowego programu muzycznego i możesz być częścią tego wyjątkowego wydarzenia! Nie musisz śpiewać ani występować – wystarczy, że dołączysz do naszej publiczności i razem z nami stworzysz niesamowitą atmosferę, którą zobaczą tysiące widzów👌🍀

Czekają na Ciebie:
🧚🏻‍♀️występy utalentowanych artystów,
🧚🏻‍♀️kulisy profesjonalnej produkcji telewizyjnej,
🧚🏻‍♀️mnóstwo pozytywnej energii i świetnych ludzi,
🧚🏻‍♀️wspomnienia, których nie da się zapomnieć!

W A R S Z A W A
👉Terminy nagrań:
1, 3, 6, 8, 9, 10, 13, 14, 15, 16, 20, 21 i 22 lipca

Gwarantujemy:
⭐️100 zł za każdy dzień zdjęciowy
⭐️Wyżywienie jak na każdej naszej widowni
⭐️Około 8–9 godzin świetnej zabawy

Liczba miejsc jest ograniczona! Wpadajcie ze znajomymi oraz rodzinką❣️

Zgłoś się wypełniając formularz:
https://forms.gle/mmsmmPwyK5BdBxK89

Lub standardowo przez maila na adres: ludzie@unagimedia.pl (w tytule wpisując rozrywka plus wybrana data / daty)

Do zobaczenia!👋🥰🥰🥰❤️

items.text:
🌟 فخامة الديكور العصري بين يديك | جملة ومفرق 🌟
​هل تبحث عن تحويل منزلك أو مكتبك إلى تحفة فنية بأحدث صيحات الديكور العالمي؟
Yuri Service تفتح لكم أبواب مستودعها الأكبر لتوفير أرقى تشكيلة من بدائل الخشب، الرخام، والحجر بأعلى جودة وأقوى الأسعار في السوق!
​نحن نجمع لك بين البيع بالجملة لأصحاب المشاريع والمحلات، والبيع بالمفرق للأفراد مع تشكيلة ألوان وموديلات (سعودي، تركي، سوري، وصيني) تلبي كل الأذواق.
​📐 تشكيلتنا ومنتجاتنا المتكاملة:
​بديل الرخام المميز: بمقاسات ملكية ضخمة 122 \times 280\text{ cm} ومقاسات متنوعة مثل 60 \times 60\text{ cm} تمنح المكان مظهراً متكاملاً بدون فواصل.
​بديل الخشب الفاخر: تشكيلة ألوان واسعة، بطول 280\text{ cm} وبعرض متنوع (12\text{cm}، 15\text{cm}، 20\text{cm}، و 60\text{cm}).
​بديل الحجر الحديث: بأشكال رائدة وألوان رملية وطبيعية ساحرة لعشاق التميز.
​إكسسوارات التشطيب والبراويز: تشكيلة ضخمة من البراويز، الزوايا العادية، وزوايا الإضاءة المخفية (لايت ستارت / Light Start) لداير السقف وداير الأرض، بالإضافة إلى المونتاجات الاحترافية المخصصة للتركيب السريع والمتين.
​🏪 تفضلوا بزيارتنا في المستودع!
​البضاعة متوفرة بكثرة وبخيارات لا تنتهي، ونفضل دائماً تشريفكم لنا في المحل/المستودع لتشاهدوا جودة الألوان والخامات على الطبيعة وتختاروا ما يناسبكم.
​📞 للطلب والاستفسار (واتساب أو اتصال مباشر):
​📱 01621660582
📍 Gelsenkirchen, Germany
​#Wandpaneele #AcousticPanels #بديل_الخشب #بديل_الرخام #بديل_الحجر #ديكورات_داخلية #تشطيبات #تجديد_منازل #ديكور_مودرن #لايت_ستارت #Wandverkleidung #Heimwerken #Interiordesign #MarmorOptik #Holzoptik #Gelsenkirchen #NordrheinWestfalen #

items.text:
Möchtest du Kontakte in der Unterhaltungsbranche knüpfen? Dann ist IndustryMe genau das Richtige für dich. IndustryMe ist eine Plattform, die sich exklusiv an Personen richtet, die sich weltweit mit anderen aus allen Bereichen der Film- und Unterhaltungsbranche vernetzen möchten. Egal, ob du Schauspieler, Filmemacher, Produzent, Casting-Direktor, Musiker oder Crew-Mitglied bist oder hinter den Kulissen in den Bereichen Recht, Marketing oder Business arbeitest – IndustryMe.net ist der ideale Ort für neue Kontakte.

Melde dich noch heute an und knüpfe Verbindungen, die deine Karriere voranbringen! #IndustryMe
items.previewDescription: Connect with theater, film, and music professionals. Find jobs, attend workshops, watch live streams, and grow your career.
items.title: IndustryMe — Theater, Film & Music Networking

items.text:
CASTING CALL
Hello, 

Looking for a late 30-40s, British/English male actor to play a Priest in a very small opening scene of a short independent film in London. 

Few lines of dialogue. 

Shoot will be within the next two weeks in West London.

Short indie rates. 

Send me a DM or email at sean@kardarstudios.com 

Many thanks

Sean

items.text:
PAID BACKGROUND ARTISTS – RUGBY 🎬
We’re casting young people for a university scene in a featured film shooting in RUGBY.

📍 Rugby 

📅 3rd July 2026

💰 £152.52 (up to 12 hours)

🎓 Ages 17–22

🌍 All genders & ethnicities

🎬 No experience needed

Transport will be provided from London and Birmingham 

Apply: castings@forcast.co.uk

Send full-length photo (no hat/sunglasses), name, age, contact number & ethnicity.

Feel free to share — we’re looking for a good crowd for the scene.

Thanks -Admin for approval!

items.text:
CASTING CALL – ANNE BOLEYN

Historic Life Narratives is seeking an accomplished actress to play Anne Boleyn in The Falcons’ Last Flight, an original two-hander exploring the final night before Anne’s execution in the Tower of London.

This is a rare opportunity to originate the role in a brand-new historical drama that places Anne’s voice, courage and humanity centre stage.

Role
Anne Boleyn
Playing Age: 25–30

Fee
Flat fee of £500, inclusive of:
• Online rehearsals
• Face-to-face rehearsals by arrangement
• Attendance at a promotional photoshoot
• One public performance

Performance Date
Saturday 14th November 2026

Venue
Tramshed Theatre, Woolwich, London

Applicants must be available to commit to the full rehearsal and performance schedule. Reliability, flexibility and professionalism are essential.

Please note that previous applicants are respectfully asked not to reapply.

To apply, please send us:
• A recent headshot or clear face photograph
• Your Spotlight link
• A brief introduction outlining your acting experience

Please apply by DM.

We look forward to discovering the actress who will bring one of history’s most fascinating and formidable women to life.

topComments.text: I’ve DMed previously but I don’t believe my message was read, would love to be considered!

Hannah Lebrecht
Especially it’s you xx

BE FORGOTTEN. ter THE FALCONS LAST FLIGHT THE ANNE BOLEYN STORY WE ARE LOOKING FOR A FEMALE To PLAY ANNE ANNEBOLEYN BOLEYN FOR THE PREMIER NIGHT PERFORMANCE IN WOOLWICH LONDON IN NOVEMBER ፊቴለል！ !! DM US DMUSIFYOUAREINTERESTED IF YOU ARE INTERESTED لة‎'‎

Onto our third week of spotlights, meet the sensational, and thrice holy, Madison Kaye, who will be joining our cast as Lucy Westenra this October!

🩸 Dracula: A Feminist Revenge Fantasy, Really by Kate Hamill
📅 29–31 October 2026
📍 St Aidan's, Rochdale
🎟️ Tickets available soon 

#DarkTheatreRochdale #Dracula #FeministTheatre #UKAmateurPremiere #MeetTheCast #LucyWestenra #KateHamill

sharedPost.text:
👼 "I have been baptised 3 times, that's pretty weird right?"

Onto our third week of spotlights, meet the sensational, and thrice holy, Madison Kaye, who will be joining our cast as Lucy Westenra this October!

🎭 About Madison:
After completing a First-Class BA (Hons) in Performance and Production, Madison threw herself straight into the creative industries. She has performed in a variety of brilliant productions and projects with The Royal Exchange, National Student Drama Festival, DaDaFest, and local powerhouse companies like Dare To Know Theatre.
Madison has also lent her talents to major organisations like the Rochdale Literature and Ideas Festival and Factory International, and even spent time modelling for Manchester United! Currently, you can catch her performing live sketch comedy regularly with Laughter is the Best Medicine (LITBM).
🤪 Facts from The Crypt
Along with her triple-holy status, Madison would like to share with you that there is a species of finch in the Galápagos that survives by landing on giant gulls, pecking their wings, and drinking their blood. 
She considers this proof that nature is just as unhinged as Kate Hamill's script, and she promises that at the performances, any vampiric biting will be confined strictly to the cast.

🩸 Dracula: A Feminist Revenge Fantasy, Really by Kate Hamill
📅 29–31 October 2026
📍 St Aidan's, Rochdale
🎟️ Tickets available soon 

#DarkTheatreRochdale #Dracula #FeministTheatre #UKAmateurPremiere #MeetTheCast

sharedPost.text:
Episode 2: The Shakespeare Hoax

Curtis gets an assignment to argue why Shakespeare matters. Fabian covers the living room with “evidence” that the playwright never existed, claiming he was a pen name for noblemen. Clifford surprisingly sides with Curtis: “He wrote good insults—that counts for something.”

items.text:
How To Stop Looking Like You’re Acting?
Join us for a 90-minute Zoom masterclass for actors called:

How to Stop Looking Like You’re Acting.

This is one of the biggest things actors struggle with on camera.

You may have strong emotions, good training, good instincts, but the moment the camera sees you “trying to act,” something starts to feel false.

And camera acting is brutal that way. Theatre can sometimes hold a bigger expression, a bigger gesture, a bigger emotional wave. But on camera, the smallest push can read as performance. 

In this 90-minute Zoom masterclass, we’ll look at what makes acting feel “actor-y” on camera, why self-tapes often start to look forced, and how to use stillness, listening, eye line, inner action, and real behavior in a more truthful way. Let’s work on the skills that can completely change how your work is perceived.

No preparation is required.

Sunday, July 5

12:00 PM EST

90 minutes | Zoom | $25 CAD

Registration link: https://forms.gle/YGzcSsQABPR4SSkW9

www.theawalab.com

items.text:
Hi everyone,
I’m currently in pre-production on my first feature film, and I’d love to hear your thoughts on something.

I’m working on the budget template, and the film will likely have around 25–50 background artists (extras).

One thing that’s really important to me is making sure everyone who works on the production feels respected and that their contribution is valued. From previous experiences, I don’t want to create a set where people feel underpaid or unappreciated.

At the moment, I’ve budgeted for extras to receive a £100 day rate, with travel and food expenses covered, and accommodation if required.

My question is: does that seem like a fair rate, or is it more generous than what’s typically expected for extras? I know it can depend on the production, the role, and the demands of the shoot, so I’d really appreciate hearing from people with experience in this area.

Thanks in advance for your advice!

Emmanuel

topComments.text: Thanks for taking the time to consider extras and supporting artists, it’s much appreciated
That is generally considered the lowest SA rate, so it is perfectly reasonable for a low budget production. And with expenses on top as well you will get lots of respect. Nice job!

items.summary:
Hi everyone,
I’m currently in pre-production on my first feature film, and I’d love to hear your thoughts on something.

I’m working on the budget template, and the film will likely have around 25–50 background artists (extras).

One thing that’s really important to me is making sure everyone who works on the production feels respected and that their contribution is valued. From previous experiences, I don’t want to create a set where people feel underpaid or unappreciated.

At the moment, I’ve budgeted for extras to receive a £100 day rate, with travel and food expenses covered, and accommodation if required.

My question is: does that seem like a fair rate, or is it more generous than what’s typically expected for extras? I know it can depend on the production, the role, and the demands of the shoot, so I’d really appreciate hearing from people with experience in this area.

Thanks in advance for your advice!

Emmanuel

sharedPost.text:
Erleben Sie eine besondere Meisterklasse mit Cornelia Helfricht vom 6 bis 8. Oktober 2026 in Hamburg: Die großartige Mezzosopranistin, hochkarätige Künstler-Agentin und Buchautorin teilt exklusiv ihr Wissen!

Infos: www.tschaikowsky-saal.de.  

Die Teilnehmerzahl ist streng begrenzt. Sichern Sie sich diese einmalige Gelegenheit und ergreifen Sie Ihre Chance auf eine außergewöhnliche künstlerische Weiterentwicklung!

Anmeldungen schicken Sie uns: dreitagemitdemmeister@gmail.com. 
 #Oper #Meisterkurs #opernsänger #agentur #klassik

items.text:
🌟 WE'RE LOOKING FOR NEW ELITE DANCERS! 🌟

Could you be our next Majestic Elite Associate?

Expressions of Interest are NOW OPEN!

Majestic Elite Associates (MEA) is our audition or invitation-only, elite training programme for passionate dancers who want to perform, compete and train at the highest level.

What You'll Get:

✨ Elite dance & performance training
🏆 Opportunities to compete, including Dance World Cup
🎭 Performance opportunities, including theatre and TV
🌍 Industry connections across the UK & Europe
🎓 Accredited exams with UCAS points available

Commitment:

📅 1 Sunday per month
➕ Optional Saturdays | 4:00pm-7:00pm

Limited places available.

👉 Express your interest today:
https://tally.so/r/gDp48d

Train. Perform. Inspire. Become a Majestic Elite Associate.

#Dancers #MajesticAcademy #Chester #PerformingArts #Dance

sharedPost.text:
Could Princess Ida be your next theatrical adventure? 👑

Join The Bentley for one of our Princess Ida Taster Sessions and discover what Gilbert & Sullivan is all about!

Whether you’re an experienced performer, a G&S enthusiast, or completely new to the stage, we’d love to welcome you. Meet our creative team, learn about the production, sing through some of Sullivan’s glorious music, and find out what being part of The Bentley is all about.

Our production of Princess Ida will be performed on 5th, 6th & 7th February 2027, and these taster evenings are the perfect opportunity to see if you’d like to get involved.

📅 Tuesday 30th June & Tuesday 7th July
🕢 7:30pm
📍 Allerton URC, Mather Avenue, Liverpool

Bring a friend, bring your voice, or simply bring your curiosity. We can’t wait to meet you! 🎶✨

WigHELm 83. ALLWELCOME ALL'

‼️ WARSZAWA 1 LIPCA ‼️
Na plan trzeciego sezonu serialu którego akcja dzieje się w latach WSPÓŁCZESNYCH  poszukujemy :

▪️ KOBIET I MĘŻCZYZN w wieku 16-70 lat jako GOŚCI NA ŚLUBIE (uroczystość w kościele). 

Wyjazd na plan do Czerwińska z Centrum w godzinach porannych ok. 5:30/6. Stawka w zależności od godzin na planie 140-120 płatne gotówką po planie.

Zgłoszenia wraz z imieniem i nazwiskiem, numerem telefonu, AKTUALNYMI zdjęciami przyjmujemy na adres: KAROLINA@ONSETAGENCY.PL w tytule wpisując „ŚLUB”

sharedPost.text:
🎬 CASTING DO SERIALU „ZAJAZD” 🎬

📍 Warszawa | 🎥 Nagrania: 6–10.07.2026 r.

👇 Sprawdź dostępne role:

👩 AGNIESZKA (39)
Żona Sylwestra. Pracuje w wydziale gospodarki odpadami komunalnymi w urzędzie. Zwyczajna, sympatyczna kobieta, od lat tkwiąca w nieszczęśliwym małżeństwie. Coraz bardziej męczy ją życiowa bierność męża i marzy o zmianie swojego życia.
🎥 Nagranie: 06.07, 07.07, 09.07 (3 dni)
💰 600 zł netto / dzień

👨 SYLWESTER (42)
Mąż Agnieszki. Powolny, ociężały i leniwy mężczyzna, któremu brakuje ambicji oraz motywacji do działania. Nie dostrzega, że jego postawa stopniowo niszczy małżeństwo.
🎥 Nagranie: 07.07, 10.07 (2 dni)
💰 600 zł netto / dzień

👩 MARTA (60)
Siostra Władka. Spokojna emerytka, mocno związana z rodziną i zawsze gotowa stanąć w obronie bliskich.
🎥 Nagranie: 08.07 (1 dzień)
💰 400 zł netto / dzień

👩 EWA (50)
Zakonnica o surowym usposobieniu. Z pozoru chłodna i stanowcza, w rzeczywistości bardzo emocjonalna i skrywająca bolesną tajemnicę z przeszłości.
🎥 Nagranie: 06.07, 07.07, 10.07 (3 dni)
💰 600 zł netto / dzień

👩 MARTA (45)
Matka Małgosi. Bardzo religijna, zasadnicza i mocno ingerująca w życie córki. Wierzy, że wie, co jest dla niej najlepsze.
🎥 Nagranie: 06.07 (1 dzień)
💰 500 zł netto / dzień

👨 PAWEŁ (48)
Ojciec Małgosi. Dobroduszny, spokojny i nieco podporządkowany żonie. Stara się łagodzić rodzinne konflikty.
🎥 Nagranie: 06.07 (1 dzień)
💰 500 zł netto / dzień

👨 RADEK (21)
Przystojny, wrażliwy chłopak o wielkim sercu. Od lat kocha Małgosię i wierzy, że jeszcze nie jest za późno, by zawalczyć o jej uczucia.
🎥 Nagranie: 06.07, 07.07, 10.07 (3 dni)
💰 600 zł netto / dzień

👩 KAREN (25)
Prostytutka. Atrakcyjna dziewczyna o wyrazistym, odważnym stylu. Mimo trudnych życiowych wyborów marzy o normalnym życiu. Gdy pojawia się szansa na nowy początek, postanawia zawalczyć o swoją przyszłość. Brak scen intymnych i nagości.
🎥 Nagranie: 07.07, 10.07 (2 dni)
💰 600 zł netto / dzień

👩 DŻESIKA (30)
Prostytutka. Atrakcyjna, pewna siebie kobieta o wyrazistym stylu. Lubi swoje życie, ceni niezależność i nie zamierza niczego zmieniać. Jest bezpośrednia i temperamentna. Brak scen intymnych i nagości.
🎥 Nagranie: 07.07, 10.07 (2 dni)
💰 600 zł netto / dzień

👨 KAROL (45)
Stanowczy mężczyzna o silnym charakterze. Opanowany i konkretny, wzbudza respekt już od pierwszego spotkania.
🎥 Nagranie: 10.07 (1 dzień)
💰 400 zł netto / dzień

👨 MARCIN (40)
Sprytny egoista. Charyzmatyczny manipulator, który zawsze stawia własne korzyści ponad dobro innych.
🎥 Nagranie: 10.07 (1 dzień)
💰 400 zł netto / dzień

🎥 WYMAGANE: demo aktorskie lub krótkie nagranie scenki

📄 Teksty dostępne w zakładce „Video”

📩 Zgłoszenia przez formularz:
👉 https://shortaudition.com/Aplikuj

sharedPost.text:
ZAGRAJ W FILMIE! STATYSTKI POSZUKIWANE!

Trwają zdjęcia do nowego filmu dla najbardziej znanej platformy streamingowej! To komedia, która skupia się w okół kobiet, dlatego szukamy Pań w wieku 18-60 lat jako uczestniczek protestu!

Przyjdź na plan i baw się świetnie razem z nami! 

Nie trzeba mieć doświadczenia! Zobacz jak wygląda powstawanie filmu od kulis! 

DATY: 5, 6, 8, 10/07/2026 - można zgłosić się na wszystkie dni lub wybrane 

MIEJSCE: Warszawa

STAWKA: 110 zł płatne gotówką po planie 

ZGŁOSZENIA:
justyna@sceneria.com.pl

W TYTULE: PROTEST + daty dostępności 

W TREŚCI: imię, nazwisko, wiek, numer telefonu, miejsce zamieszkania, zdjęcie twarzy i sylwetki 

DAJ ZNAĆ KOLEŻANKOM - CHODŹCIE RAZEM NA PLAN! DO ZOBACZENIA!

items.text:
CASTING WARSZAWA
Szukam kobiety BLONDYNKI lub o jasnorudych / jasnobrązowych włosach, w wieku 38-50 lat, o przyjemnej aparycji. Zadbana, wysportowana. Narodowość nie ma znaczenia.

Nagrywamy materiał wideo do mobilnej aplikacji o zdrowiu: profilaktyka i łagodzenie bólu pleców (szyi i kręgosłupa) — w sumie będzie 33 łatwe i bezpieczne ćwiczenia.

Terminy:

W okresie 1–5 lipca — dwie próby (daty zostaną ustalone po wyborze aktorki) — zmiany po 6 godzin.

W okresie 6–12 lipca — trzy dni zdjęciowe (dokładne daty podamy później) — pełne zmiany.

Gaża: 2220 USD = 8360 PLN (według dzisiejszego kursu, brutto).

Kwota obejmuje dni zdjęciowe, próby oraz przekazanie praw.

Brak ograniczeń co do udziału w innych projektach.

Przyjmowanie zgłoszeń DO 14:00 we wtorek (30 czerwca).

Osoby zainteresowane proszę o przesłanie na adres: filmyklipyserialy@gmail.com

Imię i nazwisko

Wiek, wzrost, rozmiar ubrania

Numer telefonu

Zdjęcia: duże ujęcie twarzy, duże ujęcie twarzy z uśmiechem oraz zdjęcie w pełnej postaci (żeby była widoczna sylwetka)

Link do wizytówki / portfolio (w dowolnym dostępnym języku). Będzie super, jeśli macie wideo, na którym uprawiacie sport.

**Tid:** ca. 3 timer – nærmere tidspunkt kommer senere

**Løn:** ulønnet, men du får et gavekort til 2x biograf billetter

 

👷‍♀️ **1 ung pige på ca 14 (i dit eget tøj)**

 

 

Skriv gerne til mig, hvis det er noget for dig, eller hvis du kender en, der kunne passe. På caba@detsocialenetvaerk.dk

 

 

Videoptagelsen skal bruges til at lave et online kursus for headspace Danmark, der skal inspirere til samtale.

Videoptagelsen skal bruges til at lave et online kursus for headspace Danmark, der skal inspirere til samtale.

items.text:
TRAILER EDITOR WANTED 

We're after an editor with a good eye for pacing, storytelling, and building excitement through editing. If you love fast-paced edits, great music, and building hype, we'd love to hear from you. We're after someone who's easy to work with, has a good eye for pacing, and can turn things around 

Details:
-- Quick turnaround 
-- Deferred payment, pending series pickup 
-- Looking for someone collaborative, reliable, and excited to help bring the project to life.
If you're interested, please reply with your reel or a few examples of work
-- Your availability over the next week
-- A rough idea of your turnaround time

If interested contact elsullivann@outlook.com and ltc.learnthecraft@gmail.com

items.text:
Hi everyone! My name is Maayan, I’m a Los Angeles-based actress and a graduate of the Acting for Camera AOS program at AMDA.

I’m currently looking to connect with filmmakers, student directors, photographers, and creatives for upcoming projects, short films, and collaborations.

I’m bilingual (Hebrew/English), comfortable with both dramatic and comedic material, and always excited to work on meaningful and visually interesting projects.

Headshots/reel available upon request — would love to connect!

items.text:
CASTING CALL – BRITISH-IRANIAN FEATURE FILM

I'm currently casting two lead roles for an independent British feature film.

We're looking for:

Male – 60–80 years old

Female – 60–80 years old

Essential:

Speak both English and Farsi

Iranian heritage

Based in or able to travel to London

Previous acting experience is welcome but not essential. We're looking for authentic, warm, engaging people who can bring these characters to life. If you've done theatre, amateur productions, television, film—or have never acted professionally but feel you'd be right—we'd love to hear from you.

Filming:

Approximately 1–2 shooting days in London.

Paid (details discussed with shortlisted applicants).

Before filming we'll spend time getting to know you through informal research interviews and script workshops. Full support will be provided throughout the process.

The film is a heartwarming British-Iranian comedy-drama exploring friendship, family, identity and belonging.

If you, or someone you know, might be interested, please send:

A recent photo

A short introduction (video welcome)

Any acting experience (if applicable)

Contact details

Please feel free to share this post with friends, family and the wider Iranian community.

DM (follow) or comment below for more info.

sharedPost.text:
Hey Leute, für unser aktuelles Low Budget, Fantasy - Horror Spielfilm Großprojekt (Kinoformat), (die Dreharbeiten sind im vollen Gange, und zu 95% abgedreht) suchen wir noch Darsteller für kleinere Rollen, aber auch Komparsen, für Ritter, Dorfbewohner, Räuber. Ihr habt Zeit und Lust dabei zu sein, dann schickt uns eure Bewerbung mit 2-3 aktuellen Bildern von euch, sowie eure Körpergröße, Kleidergröße, Schuhgröße an: harlekin-filme@web.de oder direkt per Messenger an Harlekin Filme. Gedreht wird im Bayerischen Wald.

Viele Grüße, euer Harlekin Filme Team

sharedPost.text:
Hello everyone,

I’m excited to announce that I’m doing picture auditions for a KFC TV advert and I’m looking for everyday people to be part of it!  

Body Type & Look  

- A variety of body sizes and styles (note: the client isn’t considering larger frames for this particular project).  
- Unique features are celebrated — things like birthmarks, gapped teeth, or anything that makes you stand out.  
- Most importantly, I want real, relatable faces that feel like everyday South Africans.  

Applicants should be based in or around Johannesburg.  

If you’re confident, not camera shy, and have features that make you uniquely you, please send your recent studio pictures to my WhatsApp: 078 121 4807.  

@highlight

items.text:
🎭 ONLINE ACTING COURSE – JULY 2026 🎭

For young people ages 8 - 13 years looking to build confidence, develop acting skills and have fun all from the comfort home!

**4-Week Online Acting Course** starting **Monday 6th July**!

📅 Dates:
• Monday 6th July
• Monday 13th July
• Monday 20th July
• Monday 27th July

🕖 Evening sessions are 90 minutes (online)

Throughout the course students will explore:
✨ Character development
✨ Script analysis
✨ Objectives and emotional journey
✨ Screen performance techniques
✨ Confidence and creativity

Perfect for young performers looking to develop their acting skills in a supportive and engaging environment.

💷 £40 for the full 4-week course

Spaces are limited, so book now to secure your place!

📩 You can email us for more information or check out our website:

classes@mcaa.co.uk

https://cherrypipsacting.co.uk/

items.text:
Hello! I'm Sonia and I am a mixed race actress and voice over artist. ( Half French and half Chinese.) I've been out of action for a year,as I was diagnosed with breast cancer last August and hsve had 8 months of chemotherapy and a lumpectomy in May. It's now thankfully gone! ( I am extremely greatful to be alive and to hsve such a wonderful,loving and supportive family and support network!!!l ) Its been a very difficult snd challenging year but I am now slowly  getting bsck I to acting and looking for work . Feel free to check out my spotlight link ( CV, show reel and voice reel included) ,along with some just new headshots. ( taken at the weekend! ) There are more headshots to come once edited and will also be uploaded! Thankyou! 

https://app.spotlight.com/profile

topComments.text: Beautiful photos ❤️ im so glad your getting better ❤️
